ead.archdesc:
======= RMM03834Temple Beth-El records3834Compiled by RMC StaffDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections
June 20142B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL:
rghis religThis finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:43:18 UTC.12/07/2018
This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor) >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Temple Beth-El records
Temple Beth-El (Ithaca, N.Y.)
3834
5.0 cubic feet. 5.0 cubic feet.
1919-2002. Correspondence, Financial documents, Photographs, Printed materials, Publications Material pertaining to the founding, meetings, worship, and activities of the temple, a congregation in the United Synagogue of Conservative Judaism. Collection material in English 2246832
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
June 2014
EAD encoding:
RMC Staff, June 2014
Date modified:
Kristen Reichenbach, August 2018
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Minutes, account books, lists, financial statements, correspondence, publications and other material pertaining to the founding, meetings, worship, and activities of the temple, a congregation in the United Synagogue of Conservative Judaism. Includes the Temple Beth-El Bulletin. Deeds and documents relating to the building and cemetery, photographs, seals and other items from the Temple are also included.
Cite As:
Temple Beth-El records, #3834. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Account books. Ithaca (N.Y.) -- Religious life and customs. Judaism -- New York (State) -- Ithaca. Synagogues -- New York (State) -- Ithaca. Temples -- New York (State) -- Ithaca.
2246832 <<<<<<< HEAD Temple Beth-El Bulletin

Contains copy of October 29,1978 Mortgage, March 1968 Agreement.Ithaca Anti-Semitism Incidents1982213

Includes various letters to the editor and articles.Miscellaneous Newspapers19831989214
Scope and Contents
Includes: Iton Ithaca, The Temple Times, The Temple Tribune, The Jewish Theological Society of America News.Rules and Regulations for the Cemeteries; including board resolutions, etc.215
Scope and Contents
Includes: photos, cemetery deed, plot information, article "The High Cost of Dying" by Ruth Mulvey Harmer, correspondence.History of the Cemeteries: Including Maps and Records216Construction Specifications and General Conditions for the Addition and Alterations to Temple Beth-El1967217

Materials previously in binder.Additions and Alterations to Temple Beth-El1966218

Program report.Obituaries219Wish List, Memorials, and Miscellaneous Information19911994220

Includes: Temple Beth-El Wish List, Guide to Congregational Standards, selections from The Reporter.Veterans' Day Service Brochures1950-1960221Temple Beth-El Star1942-1943222Ithaca Community Union Thanksgiving Service Brochures1942-1960223Tercentenary Material224

Includes: brochures, correspondence, and articles regarding the tercentenary of the American Jewish community.Miscellaneous Temple Publications225

Includes: event brochures, correspondence, documents, etc.Publications from the Jewish Theological Society of America1964226
Scope and Contents
Includes: "Aspects of Rabbinic Theology" by Solomon Schechter and "The Unseen Powerful Force in Life" by Rabbi Bernard Mandelbaum.Community Reception and Brunch19901992227Temple Anniversary Publications1978-2003228

Bound notebook, includes financial records and minutes.Board Meeting Minutes19315

Bound notebook, spine is detached, papers inserted into book, drawings on inside covers.CorrespondenceCorrespondence: Temple Policies1964-1975313

Includes Constitution And Bylaws of Temple Beth-El, various mailings regarding temple policy.Miscellaneous Correspondence, Rabbinical Appointments, Activities1959-1967314The Rabbinical Society of America (כנסית הרבנים באמריקה)1953-1964315

Copies of letters sent to new members of the temple.Temple Beth-El Correspondence Received1965-1967317Miscellaneous PublicationsGuide to the Jewish Holidays1944324

Includes correspondence, receipts of donations, lists of uncollected and collected pledge donations.Contributor Records1925-19275

Ledger with names and addresses of contributors, and dates and amounts of donations.Cornell Jewish Temple Fund Administrative Account1925-19275

Ledger with deposits and withdrawals including specific allocations of voucher money.PhotographsSieger 6/4/70June 4, 1970318

Box with return address of J.S. Hecht. Includes 19 color slides.ArtifactsYad7
Scope and Contents
Metal rod with chain, hand with pointer finger (detached); used for reading scripture.Scroll, "Psalms of David"7
Scope and Contents
Facsimile scroll of the Book of Psalms on one roller, with fabric cover marked "Psalms of David". One knob at the end of the roller missing. Text in English.מגילת אסתר (Story of Esther)7
Scope and Contents
Facsimile scroll of the Story of Esther, includes fabric cover marked "מגילת אסתר Story of Esther", stored in cardboard box. Text in Hebrew.מגילת אסתר (Story of Esther)January 17, 19497
Scope and Contents
Facsimile scroll of the Story of Esther, includes fabric cover marked "מגילת אסתר Story of Esther", stored in cardboard box. Text in Hebrew. Rolled up with flyer for the Matzoh Fund (Text in Hebrew and English) and telegram from Kollel America.Stamps7
Scope and Contents
Six stamps of varying sizes; three imprinted with the image of Temple Beth-El, one imprinted with image of a lamp, one with image of a menorah, and one with image of a scroll marked "USY""Official" Pocket Seal7
Scope and Contents
Metal pocket seal (two parts which fit together); seal reads "Temple Beth-El of Ithaca, NY, Inc. 1924". Includes instruction guide, leather case, identification labels, "The Sigwalt Notary and Corporation Handbook"; stored in "Official" cardboard box."A Gift from Menorah Chapels...to remember the important celebrations of our faith."8
Scope and Contents
Information on the holidays of Rosh Hashana, Yom Kippur, Sukkot, Chanukah, and Passover; Drawings of religious objects.Audio MediaThe Early History of Temple Beth-ElCD-2045May 7, 20037
Scope and Contents
CD Format, return address of Matt Braun.Temple Beth-El 75th Anniversary Program, Audio cassetteTR-10081May 19, 20037PostersFoam Board Posters, 11" x 11"
Scope and Contents
Posters printed with photographs, articles, and other historical documents. Prepared by congregant Matthew Braun, director of the Tompkins County History Center, for the 75th anniversary commemoration event at Temple Beth-El."Snapshots Of Our Community" by Matthew Braun; description of the panel collection.20038
Scope and Contents
11" x 11" BoardPhoto of people crowding around the temple, sign reading "The New Religious School, Expanded Sanctuary Social Hall, Temple Beth El".20038
Scope and Contents
11" x 11" BoardPurim, 1909(?)20038
Scope and Contents
11" x 11" BoardPhotos, letter, and program of Cornerstone Laying, Sunday August 26, 1928, 3 PM.20038

11" x 11" BoardSanborn Fire Insurance Map, 1929-196520038
Scope and Contents
11" x 11" BoardArticle, "The Future Jew and Jewess of Cornell"20038
Scope and Contents
11" x 11" BoardArticle, "How Proposed Jewish Temple in Ithaca Will Look if the Local Campaign for Funds is Successful; Reasons Given Why Public Should Aid Project"20038
Scope and Contents
11" x 11" BoardPictures of Mr. and Mrs. Nathan Hanford, 1898-99; Letter to Daniel Rothschild from Unitarian Church about donations.20038
Scope and Contents
11" x 11" BoardIthaca Aerial View, 193820038

Scope and Contents
24" x 16" Board. Photo by Richard Jump marking his participation in the Bnai Torah Celebration of Parashah/Shabbat VaYakhel.Collage Posters
Scope and Contents
Posters with attached photographs, articles, and other historical documents.Articles: "Klansman Spells Out His Beliefs in Exclusive Interview", "Klan 'Ideals' Suspect, Anti-Defamation Chief Says", "Teachers to Have Workshop Session", "Teachers Urged to Meet Child's Emotional Needs"; Info and photos of Gertrude Noar, Daniel Rothschild Lodge.1965July-December19658
Scope and Contents
Certain items highlighted and connected with arrows."B'nai B'rith Vocational Service"; B'nai B'rith Commission on Israel, Bulletin for February 1966; A.D.L. Guest Speaker Hersh L. Adlerstein; Hillel at Cornell University, Spring 1966; The ADL Bulletin, September 1965, "Are Europe's Jews in Danger?"; B'nai B'rith Adult Jewish Education "Time For Torah"; Leo N. Levi Memorial Hospital, letter from Fannie B. McLaughlin to Mr. Marvin; photo of B'nai B'rith Building, Washington, D.C.1965-19668
Scope and Contents
Certain items highlighted and connected with arrows.Daniel Rothschild Lodge 1450 B'nai Birth, Open Meeting for Husbands and Wives, September 21, 1965; "B'nai B'rith To Present Essay Prizes"; "Brotherhood Essay"; "Classes Learn Lessons Of Brotherhood Week"; "Servicemen Write Thanks For Cayugan Each Month"; Tompkins County Mental Health Association, "Breakdown"; "Flower Pots"; Letter of thanks from Ithaca Junior Bowling Council to B'nai B'rith; "Fifteen Institutions Consider The Organization Of New Scout Units"; Inter-Fraternal Council, Ithaca, New York, Members Lists; "Event Honors 17 Inductees"; The Cayugan, 2 March, 1966; Letter from Rabbi Henry E. Barneis to B'nai B'rith Daniel Rothschild Lodge; Daniel Rothschild Lodge 1450 B'nai B'rith meetings, 1965-1966.1960-19668
Scope and Contents
Certain items highlighted and connected with arrows. Sticky note on back reading "Matt Braun".CertificatesAward Of Honor for the Sisterhood Beth El Ithaca, given by The Jewish Theological Seminary of America1965-19668Certificate of Membership of Temple Beth-El to The Union of American Hebrew CongregationsMarch 28, 19498Charter of Affiliation of Temple Beth-El to The United Synagogue of AmericaJune 4, 19898State of New York Office of the Secretary of State, Certificate of Incorporation of Temple Beth-El of Ithaca, New York, Inc.August 20, 192481
Scope and Contents
Signed by James A. Hamilton. ======= Temple Beth-El Bulletin

Scope and Contents
Posters printed with photographs, articles, and other historical documents. Prepared by congregant Matthew Braun, director of the Tompkins County History Center, for the 75th anniversary commemoration event at Temple Beth-El."Snapshots Of Our Community" by Matthew Braun; description of the panel collection.20038

Scope and Contents
Posters with attached photographs, articles, and other historical documents.Articles: "Klansman Spells Out His Beliefs in Exclusive Interview", "Klan 'Ideals' Suspect, Anti-Defamation Chief Says", "Teachers to Have Workshop Session", "Teachers Urged to Meet Child's Emotional Needs"; Info and photos of Gertrude Noar, Daniel Rothschild Lodge.1965July-December19658
Scope and Contents
Certain items highlighted and connected with arrows."B'nai B'rith Vocational Service"; B'nai B'rith Commission on Israel, Bulletin for February 1966; A.D.L. Guest Speaker Hersh L. Adlerstein; Hillel at Cornell University, Spring 1966; The ADL Bulletin, September 1965, "Are Europe's Jews in Danger?"; B'nai B'rith Adult Jewish Education "Time For Torah"; Leo N. Levi Memorial Hospital, letter from Fannie B. McLaughlin to Mr. Marvin; photo of B'nai B'rith Building, Washington, D.C.1965-19668
Scope and Contents
Certain items highlighted and connected with arrows.Daniel Rothschild Lodge 1450 B'nai Birth, Open Meeting for Husbands and Wives, September 21, 1965; "B'nai B'rith To Present Essay Prizes"; "Brotherhood Essay"; "Classes Learn Lessons Of Brotherhood Week"; "Servicemen Write Thanks For Cayugan Each Month"; Tompkins County Mental Health Association, "Breakdown"; "Flower Pots"; Letter of thanks from Ithaca Junior Bowling Council to B'nai B'rith; "Fifteen Institutions Consider The Organization Of New Scout Units"; Inter-Fraternal Council, Ithaca, New York, Members Lists; "Event Honors 17 Inductees"; The Cayugan, 2 March, 1966; Letter from Rabbi Henry E. Barneis to B'nai B'rith Daniel Rothschild Lodge; Daniel Rothschild Lodge 1450 B'nai B'rith meetings, 1965-1966.1960-19668
Scope and Contents
Certain items highlighted and connected with arrows. Sticky note on back reading "Matt Braun".CertificatesAward Of Honor for the Sisterhood Beth El Ithaca, given by The Jewish Theological Seminary of America1965-19668Certificate of Membership of Temple Beth-El to The Union of American Hebrew CongregationsMarch 28, 19498Charter of Affiliation of Temple Beth-El to The United Synagogue of AmericaJune 4, 19898State of New York Office of the Secretary of State, Certificate of Incorporation of Temple Beth-El of Ithaca, New York, Inc.August 20, 192481
